verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc vastaberis, filia latronis.  Obsidionem posuerunt super nos :  in virga percutient maxillam judicis Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַתָּה֙ תִּתְגֹּדְדִ֣י בַת־גְּד֔וּד מָצ֖וֹר שָׂ֣ם עָלֵ֑ינוּ בַּשֵּׁ֙בֶט֙ יַכּ֣וּ עַֽל־הַלְּחִ֔י אֵ֖ת שֹׁפֵ֥ט יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Now shalt thou be laid waste, O daughter of the robber: they have laid siege against us, with a rod shall they strike the cheek of the judge of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hankitse nyt, sinä sotanainen: sillä meitä piiritetään; ja Israelin tuomaria vitsalla poskelle lyödään.
verses.king_james: Now gather thyself in troops, O daughter of troops: he hath laid siege against us: they shall smite the judge of Israel with a rod upon the cheek.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tu, Bethlehem Ephrata,  parvulus es in millibus Juda ;  ex te mihi egredietur qui sit dominator in Israël,  et egressus ejus ab initio,  a diebus æternitatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֞ה בֵּֽית־לֶ֣חֶם אֶפְרָ֗תָה צָעִיר֙ לִֽהְיוֹת֙ בְּאַלְפֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֔ה מִמְּךָ֙ לִ֣י יֵצֵ֔א לִֽהְי֥וֹת מוֹשֵׁ֖ל בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וּמוֹצָאֹתָ֥יו מִקֶּ֖דֶם מִימֵ֥י עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou Bethlehem Ephrata, art a little one among the thousands of Juda, out of thee shall he come forth unto me that is to be the ruler in Israel: and his going forth is from the beginning, from the days of eternity.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinä, Betlehem Ephrata, joka vähäinen olet Juudan tuhanten seassa, sinusta on minulle se tuleva, joka Israelissa on hallitsia oleva, jonka uloskäymys on ollut alusta ja ijankaikkisuudesta.
verses.king_james: But thou, Beth–lehem Ephratah, though thou be little among the thousands of Judah, yet out of thee shall he come forth unto me that is to be ruler in Israel; whose goings forth have been from of old, from everlasting.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc dabit eos usque ad tempus in quo parturiens pariet,  et reliquiæ fratrum ejus convertentur ad filios Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֣ן יִתְּנֵ֔ם עַד־עֵ֥ת יוֹלֵדָ֖ה יָלָ֑דָה וְיֶ֣תֶר אֶחָ֔יו יְשׁוּב֖וּן עַל־בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore will he give them up even till the time wherein she that travaileth shall bring forth: and the remnant of his brethren shall be converted to the children of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän antaa heitä siihen aikaan asti vaivattaa, kuin se on synnyttänyt, jonka pitää synnyttämän; ja jääneet hänen veljistänsä pitää tuleman jälleen Israelin lasten tykö.
verses.king_james: Therefore will he give them up, until the time that she which travaileth hath brought forth: then the remnant of his brethren shall return unto the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et stabit, et pascet in fortitudine Domini,  in sublimitate nominis Domini Dei sui :  et convertentur,  quia nunc magnificabitur usque ad terminos terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָמַ֗ד וְרָעָה֙ בְּעֹ֣ז יְהֹוָ֔ה בִּגְא֕וֹן שֵׁ֖ם יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֑יו וְיָשָׁ֕בוּ כִּֽי־עַתָּ֥ה יִגְדַּ֖ל עַד־אַפְסֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall stand, and feed in the strength of the Lord, in the height of the name of the Lord, his God: and they shall be converted, for now shall he be magnified even to the ends of the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän on astuva edes, ja kaitseva Herran väkevyyden kautta, ja Herran Jumalansa nimen korkeuden kautta, ja heidän pitää levossa asuman; sillä hän on nyt kuuluisaksi tuleva niin lavialta kuin maailma on.
verses.king_james: And he shall stand and feed in the strength of the Lord, in the majesty of the name of the Lord his God; and they shall abide: for now shall he be great unto the ends of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit iste pax :  cum venerit Assyrius in terram nostram,  et quando calcaverit domibus nostris,  et suscitabimus super eum septem pastores  et octo primates homines ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֥ה זֶ֖ה שָׁל֑וֹם אַשּׁ֣וּר ׀ כִּֽי־יָב֣וֹא בְאַרְצֵ֗נוּ וְכִ֤י יִדְרֹךְ֙ בְּאַרְמְנוֹתֵ֔ינוּ וַהֲקֵמֹ֤נוּ עָלָיו֙ שִׁבְעָ֣ה רֹעִ֔ים וּשְׁמֹנָ֖ה נְסִיכֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And this man shall be our peace, when the Assyrian shall come into our land, and when he shall set his foot in our houses: and we shall raise against him seven shepherds, and eight principal men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Me saamme myös rauhan Assurilta, joka nyt meidän maallemme tullut on, ja meidän huoneemme tallannut on; sillä häntä vastaan pitää seitsemän paimenta ja kahdeksan päämiestä herätettämän.
verses.king_james: And this man shall be the peace, when the Assyrian shall come into our land: and when he shall tread in our palaces, then shall we raise against him seven shepherds, and eight principal men.

verses.latin_vulgate: et pascent terram Assur in gladio,  et terram Nemrod in lanceis ejus,  et liberabit ab Assur cum venerit in terram nostram,  et cum calcaverit in finibus nostris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָע֞וּ אֶת־אֶ֤רֶץ אַשּׁוּר֙ בַּחֶ֔רֶב וְאֶת־אֶ֥רֶץ נִמְרֹ֖ד בִּפְתָחֶ֑יהָ וְהִצִּיל֙ מֵֽאַשּׁ֔וּר כִּֽי־יָב֣וֹא בְאַרְצֵ֔נוּ וְכִ֥י יִדְרֹ֖ךְ בִּגְבוּלֵֽנוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall feed the land of Assyria with the sword, and the land of Nemrod with the spears thereof: and he shall deliver us from the Assyrian when he shall come into our land, and when he shall tread in our borders.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka Assurin maan miekalla hävittävät, ja Nimrodin maan heidän omissansa; niin me Assurista päästetyksi tulemme, joka meidän maallemme tullut on, ja meidän rajamme tallannut on.
verses.king_james: And they shall waste the land of Assyria with the sword, and the land of Nimrod in the entrances thereof: thus shall he deliver us from the Assyrian, when he cometh into our land, and when he treadeth within our borders.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erunt reliquiæ Jacob in medio populorum multorum  quasi ros a Domino,  et quasi stillæ super herbam,  quæ non exspectat virum,  et non præstolatur filios hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֣ה ׀ שְׁאֵרִ֣ית יַעֲקֹ֗ב בְּקֶ֙רֶב֙ עַמִּ֣ים רַבִּ֔ים כְּטַל֙ מֵאֵ֣ת יְהֹוָ֔ה כִּרְבִיבִ֖ים עֲלֵי־עֵ֑שֶׂב אֲשֶׁ֤ר לֹֽא־יְקַוֶּה֙ לְאִ֔ישׁ וְלֹ֥א יְיַחֵ֖ל לִבְנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the remnant of Jacob shall be in the midst of many peoples, as a dew from the Lord, and as drops upon the grass, which waiteth not for man, nor tarrieth for the children of men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jääneet Jakobissa pitää myös monen kansan seassa oleman, niinkuin kaste Herralta, ja niinkuin sateen pisarat ruoholla, joka ei ketään odota, eikä ihmistä tottele.
verses.king_james: And the remnant of Jacob shall be in the midst of many people as a dew from the Lord, as the showers upon the grass, that tarrieth not for man, nor waiteth for the sons of men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erunt reliquiæ Jacob in gentibus,  in medio populorum multorum,  quasi leo in jumentis silvarum,  et quasi catulus leonis in gregibus pecorum,  qui cum transierit, et conculcaverit, et ceperit,  non est qui eruat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָה֩ שְׁאֵרִ֨ית יַעֲקֹ֜ב בַּגּוֹיִ֗ם בְּקֶ֙רֶב֙ עַמִּ֣ים רַבִּ֔ים כְּאַרְיֵה֙ בְּבַהֲמ֣וֹת יַ֔עַר כִּכְפִ֖יר בְּעֶדְרֵי־צֹ֑אן אֲשֶׁ֧ר אִם־עָבַ֛ר וְרָמַ֥ס וְטָרַ֖ף וְאֵ֥ין מַצִּֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the remnant of Jacob shall be among the Gentiles, in the midst of many peoples, as a lion among the beasts of the forests, and as a young lion among the flocks of sheep: who, when he shall go through, and tread down, and take there is none to deliver.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jääneet Jakobista pitää pakanain seassa, monen kansan tykönä oleman, niinkuin jalopeura metsän petoin seassa, ja niinkuin nuori jalopeura lammaslauman seassa, jota ei kenkään voi karkottaa, kuin hän menee lävitse, sotkuu ja repelee.
verses.king_james: And the remnant of Jacob shall be among the Gentiles in the midst of many people as a lion among the beasts of the forest, as a young lion among the flocks of sheep: who, if he go through, both treadeth down, and teareth in pieces, and none can deliver.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaltabitur manus tua super hostes tuos,  et omnes inimici tui interibunt.
verses.douay_rheims: Thy hand shall be lifted up over thy enemies, and all thy enemies shall be cut off.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun kätes saa voiton kaikkia vihollisias vastaan, että kaikki sinun vihollises hävitetään.
verses.king_james: Thine hand shall be lifted up upon thine adversaries, and all thine enemies shall be cut off.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa, dicit Dominus :  auferam equos tuos de medio tui,  et disperdam quadrigas tuas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֤ה בַיּוֹם־הַהוּא֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְהִכְרַתִּ֥י סוּסֶ֖יךָ מִקִּרְבֶּ֑ךָ וְהַאֲבַדְתִּ֖י מַרְכְּבֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it shall come to pass in that day, saith the Lord, that I will take away thy horses out of the midst of thee, and will destroy thy chariots.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä ajalla, sanoo Herra, tahdon minä ottaa sinulta pois sinun hevoses, ja kadottaa sinun rattaas,
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, saith the Lord, that I will cut off thy horses out of the midst of thee, and I will destroy thy chariots:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et perdam civitates terræ tuæ,  et destruam omnes munitiones tuas :  et auferam maleficia de manu tua,  et divinationes non erunt in te :
verses.douay_rheims: And I will destroy the cities of thy land, and will throw down all thy strong holds, and I will take away sorceries out of thy hand, and there shall be no divinations in thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tahdon sinun maas kaupungit hävittää, ja kaikki sinun linnas särkeä;
verses.king_james: And I will cut off the cities of thy land, and throw down all thy strong holds:

verses.latin_vulgate: et perire faciam sculptilia tua et statuas tuas de medio tui,  et non adorabis ultra opera manuum tuarum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִכְרַתִּ֥י כְשָׁפִ֖ים מִיָּדֶ֑ךָ וּֽמְעוֹנְנִ֖ים לֹ֥א יִֽהְיוּ־לָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will destroy thy graven things, and thy statues, out of the midst of thee: and thou shalt no more adore the works of thy hands.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tahdon velhot sinussa hävittää, ettei yksikään tietäjä pidä sinun tykönäs oleman.
verses.king_james: And I will cut off witchcrafts out of thine hand; and thou shalt have no more soothsayers:

verses.latin_vulgate: et perire faciam sculptilia tua et statuas tuas de medio tui,  et non adorabis ultra opera manuum tuarum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִכְרַתִּ֧י פְסִילֶ֛יךָ וּמַצֵּבוֹתֶ֖יךָ מִקִּרְבֶּ֑ךָ וְלֹא־תִשְׁתַּחֲוֶ֥ה ע֖וֹד לְמַעֲשֵׂ֥ה יָדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will destroy thy graven things, and thy statues, out of the midst of thee: and thou shalt no more adore the works of thy hands.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tahdon temmata pois sinun kuvas ja epäjumalas sinusta, ettei sinun pidä enää kumartaman sinun kättes tekoja.
verses.king_james: Thy graven images also will I cut off, and thy standing images out of the midst of thee; and thou shalt no more worship the work of thine hands.

verses.latin_vulgate: et evellam lucos tuos de medio tui,  et conteram civitates tuas.
verses.douay_rheims: And I will pluck up thy groves out of the midst of thee: and will crush thy cities.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tahdon hakata maahan sinun metsistös, ja sinun kaupunkis hävittää.
verses.king_james: And I will pluck up thy groves out of the midst of thee: so will I destroy thy cities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et faciam, in furore et in indignatione, ultionem  in omnibus gentibus quæ non audierunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָשִׂ֜יתִי בְּאַ֧ף וּבְחֵמָ֛ה נָקָ֖ם אֶת־הַגּוֹיִ֑ם אֲשֶׁ֖ר לֹ֥א שָׁמֵֽעוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And I will execute vengeance in wrath, and in indignation, among all the nations that have not given ear.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä tahdon kostaa hirmuisuudella ja vihalla kaikki pakanat, jotka ei tahdo kuulla.
verses.king_james: And I will execute vengeance in anger and fury upon the heathen, such as they have not heard.
